identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Educational App' with 'Adventure Game' and 'Craft Project'.
Emotion First: Every screen must feel Safe, Encouraging, and Magical.
Content is King: The words are the heroes; the UI is the stage.
Zoom In: Big, chunky buttons and text for little hands.
Negative Space: Don't clutter the forest; let the trees breathe.
Contrast: High contrast for accessibility (WCAG AA).

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-primary-DEFAULT drop-shadow-sm
scale.caption: text-sm md:text-base font-bold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wide

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-black text-xl shadow-[0_6px_0_rgb(27,94,32)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[6px] transition-all hover:bg-primary-hover
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-bold text-lg shadow-[0_4px_0_rgb(93,64,55)] active:shadow-none active:translate-y-[4px] transition-all hover:bg-secondary-hover
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-primary-DEFAULT hover:bg-primary-light/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-bold transition-colors
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full bg-white shadow-md hover:scale-110 transition-transform text-primary-DEFAULT

cards.default: bg-white rounded-3xl border-4 border-primary-light shadow-[8px_8px_0_#C8E6C9] p-6
cards.wood: bg-[#8D6E63] rounded-xl border-4 border-[#5D4037] shadow-[4px_4px_0_#3E2723] p-6 text-white pattern-diagonal-lines-sm
cards.cloud: bg-white rounded-[2rem] border-b-8 border-slate-100 shadow-xl p-8 relative

inputs.default: w-full bg-white border-4 border-primary-light rounded-2xl px-4 py-3 text-xl font-bold text-primary-DEFAULT placeholder:text-primary-light/70 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary-DEFAULT focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary-light/30 transition-all

dashboard_student.description: A 'Map' of the forest. Each widget is a location (Word Bank, Game, Progress). Use organic shapes.

dashboard_teacher.description: Clear mastery tables. Less whimsical, more functional, but still friendly.

game_screen.description: Focus on the word. Distractions pushed to edges.

decorations.leaf_badge: absolute -top-4 -right-4 bg-accent-yellow text-secondary-DEFAULT font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full shadow-md rotate-12

mascots.name: Professor Hoot (Owl)
mascots.description: Bright felt owl craft. Use in circular avatars or popping out from corners.

mascots.name: Sidekick Raccoon
mascots.description: Real raccoon. Use with 'grayscale' filter or 'sepia' to match cartoon vibe if needed, or just as a cute photo badge.

backgrounds.name: Sunny Forest
backgrounds.description: Scenic autumn forest. Use with CSS overlay: 'bg-green-900/80 mix-blend-overlay' to tint it forest green.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons (Leaf, Cloud, Sun, Book, Trophy).
Install 'framer-motion' for the 'Spelling Rain' drops and 'Meaning Match' card flips.
Use 'Nunito' font from Google Fonts. Add import to index.css.
Create a 'ThemeWrapper' that applies the #E8F5E9 background globally.
For the 'Spelling Rain' game: Create a full-screen canvas or absolute positioned divs for falling letters.
For the 'Meaning Match' game: Use a Grid of 'Flippable Cards' (Memory game style).
For the 'Sentence Architect' game: Use 'Drag and Drop' (react-beautiful-dnd or dnd-kit) or simple click-to-move word blocks.
Teacher Dashboard: Use 'Recharts' for mastery tables (Simple Bar Charts showing 'Words Mastered' vs 'Words Struggling').
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
